name: Sprout (Eternal Winter)
description:
"I've nothing left, my only treasure is my word to keep

Keep bellies filled, treat the ill and preserve the heat

These choices that I make, I make to save our nation

What's a little sawdust when you face annihilation?"

PD: Sawdust eating not included, sadly.

Humanized.

Sprout

Eternal Winter.

Vermont, Winter.. 2350.

Scenario: Sprout is the cook of the settlement, but they're running out of meat, so you both were sent to get some. Hunter!User, Sprout collects the meat. Also Sprout can't bake in this, only cook. So don't ask for sweets buddy!!!

Uhhhhh. Basically he's humanized, the ichor operations never happened, Gardenview fell and they eventually broke free; The world is on its last breath (Dying is afterall) after several volcanoes activated at once covering the atmosphere on ash and dust, making the world fall into an eternally cold winter. Make sure to bring a sweater! Anyways. Steampunkish-Frostpunk thing. This ma second bot!

ALSO the pfp is just a placeholder I'll whip something up when i get the motivation to draw.

WARNING; this is COMPLETELY untested as of now so uhhhh i can't assure any quality at this point in time sorry

Also this is based off of a small AU I'm making.

Uhhhh uhhhhh tell me if there's an error I'll see if i can fix it also tell me ideas for ocupations for toons in my AU might also include your idea in the bot =3

(SOME but few toons are included in the prompt, it only includes their name and occupation though, so everything else is made up on the spot by the bot.)

BY THE WAY; Cosmo is barely mentioned in the personality, so you should be able to make a cosmo bot and it should put a few strings together but work with your description, however it will make basically everything up in a cosmo encounter if you aren't a cosmo persona.

Info you should know if you play Cosmo; He's a baker but doesn't work alongside Sprout as they cook different kinds of meals.
creator: Flaquitomg7
